description:
The companion app for Xteink X4 CrossPoint Reader
Inkcast lets you send web articles, links, and documents to your e-reader device as properly formatted EPUB files over your local network.

Features:
- Discover e-reader devices on your local network automatically
- Convert web links and articles into clean, readable EPUB format
- Upload EPUB files directly to your e-reader wirelessly
- Cross-platform: works on Android and iOS via Kotlin Multiplatform
- Multiple language support (English, Ukrainian, Spanish, German)
- No tracking, no ads, no account required

Inkcast is built with Kotlin Multiplatform and Compose Multiplatform, providing a native experience on every platform. All processing happens locally on your device — no cloud services involved.
